title: Rich Brazilian Rigatoni Pasta
description: A buttery and cozy Brazilian dish featuring rigatoni, bhuna, and a glassy-jelly texture, served in a molcajete vessel, this keto-friendly recipe is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rigatoni according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the bhuna sauce, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked chicken breast, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Drain the cooked rigatoni and add it to the skillet, tossing to coat with the sauce and chicken mixture.
Transfer the rigatoni mixture to a molcajete vessel and top with shredded parmesan cheese.
Place the molcajete under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the molcajete from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the Rich Brazilian Rigatoni Pasta hot and enjoy.
